description_long: This kiosk features a three-panel, angular enclosure with a panoramic cityscape mural on the interior surfaces, depicting futuristic skyscrapers and a blue sky. The panels are tall and form a partial wraparound, creating a semi-private space. At the center, there is a compact, white service counter or desk with a few geometric compartments, likely for storage or display. The exterior of the kiosk is plain and white, with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing a clean, modern aesthetic. The roof is flat and continuous with the panel walls, lacking any overhangs or decorative elements. The overall design is minimalist, focusing on the striking interior mural and functional central counter.
description: A modern, angular kiosk with a wraparound cityscape mural inside and a central white service counter, enclosed by plain white exterior panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cityscape mural, central counter, and the open, inviting layout of the kiosk.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain white exterior panel and a partial glimpse of the mural inside.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, unadorned white back panels with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the plain exterior and a hint of the interior mural.
attribute_signage_type: printed mural on interior panels, panoramic cityscape imagery, no visible text or symbols
attribute_roof_design: flat roof continuous with wall panels, no overhangs or decorative features, smooth surface
attribute_architectural_style: modern minimalist with futuristic mural accents
